item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced he would resign from office after facing a rebellion from members of his own party. Starmer became prime minister in 2024 after winning a landslide election.

media:content.media:title: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation
media:content.media:description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced he would resign from office after facing a rebellion from members of his own party. Starmer became prime minister in 2024 after winning a landslide election.

item.title: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation

item.description: Alan Greenspan, the influential economist who chaired the Federal Reserve for two decades and was the beloved husband of NBC’s Andrea Mitchell, has died at 100 after complications from Parkinson's disease. NBC’s Kristen Welker shares a look back at Greenspan’s life and his impact on the economy.

media:content.media:title: Influential Former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan Dies at 100
media:content.media:description: Alan Greenspan, the influential economist who chaired the Federal Reserve for two decades and was the beloved husband of NBC’s Andrea Mitchell, has died at 100 after complications from Parkinson's disease. NBC’s Kristen Welker shares a look back at Greenspan’s life and his impact on the economy.

item.title: Influential Former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan Dies at 100

item.description: Vice President JD Vance made remarks on the progress of talks between the U.S. and Iran in Bürgenstock, Switzerland, highlighting a “successful foundation.” Additionally, Vance talked about progress towards protecting Lebanon’s “territorial integrity and sovereignty” and Israel’s security.

media:content.media:title: Vance touts 'successful foundation' in remarks on Iran-U.S. negotiations
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance made remarks on the progress of talks between the U.S. and Iran in Bürgenstock, Switzerland, highlighting a “successful foundation.” Additionally, Vance talked about progress towards protecting Lebanon’s “territorial integrity and sovereignty” and Israel’s security.

item.title: Vance touts 'successful foundation' in remarks on Iran-U.S. negotiations

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Despite a war disrupting its soccer infrastructure, visa issues and travel restrictions, Iran will enter its final game of World Cup group play with a chance to move into the knockout round.

media:content.media:text: Iranian team members celebrate in a huddle
media:content.media:description: Mehdi Taremi of Iran, right, celebrates scoring a goal with teammates before it was disallowed for offside during Iran's World Cup group match against Belgium on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Amir Ghalenoei looks off while standing on the soccer field inside of a stadium
media:content.media:description: Mehdi Taremi of Iran, right, celebrates scoring a goal with teammates before it was disallowed for offside during Iran's World Cup group match against Belgium on Sunday.

item.title: Iran defying hardships and dreaming of first World Cup knockout round appearance

item.description: La jornada dominical en la Copa del Mundo protagonizó lindos momentos en los duelos como la reivindicación de españoles y egipcios, además de la gran actuación de Cabo Verde.

media:content.media:title: Las goleadas de España y Egipto, así como le heroico empate de Cabo Verde ante Uruguay
media:content.media:description: La jornada dominical en la Copa del Mundo protagonizó lindos momentos en los duelos como la reivindicación de españoles y egipcios, además de la gran actuación de Cabo Verde.

item.title: Las goleadas de España y Egipto, así como le heroico empate de Cabo Verde ante Uruguay

item.description: Todo el Mundial destaca el papel de Cabo Verde con un Gary Rodríguez que se luce contra un Uruguay con errores y obligada a conseguir puntos de victoria contra España. El portero de Irán detiene un riflazo de Lukaku con una sola mano.

media:content.media:title: Todo el Mundial | Cabo Verde e Irán se imponen ante selecciones de alto nivel
media:content.media:description: Todo el Mundial destaca el papel de Cabo Verde con un Gary Rodríguez que se luce contra un Uruguay con errores y obligada a conseguir puntos de victoria contra España. El portero de Irán detiene un riflazo de Lukaku con una sola mano.

item.title: Todo el Mundial | Cabo Verde e Irán se imponen ante selecciones de alto nivel

item.description: El delantero del Liverpool se consagró como máximo goleador de la historia de los "Faraones" y lideró el triunfo ante los "All Whites" en Vancouver; firmaron su primer triunfo mundialista y se afianzaron como líderes del Grupo G, acariciando los 16avos.

media:content.media:title: Con un Salah histórico: Egipto golea a Nueva Zelanda y firma su primer triunfo en un Mundial
media:content.media:description: El delantero del Liverpool se consagró como máximo goleador de la historia de los "Faraones" y lideró el triunfo ante los "All Whites" en Vancouver; firmaron su primer triunfo mundialista y se afianzaron como líderes del Grupo G, acariciando los 16avos.

item.title: Con un Salah histórico: Egipto golea a Nueva Zelanda y firma su primer triunfo en un Mundial

item.description: España goleó a Arabia Saudita y tomó impulso en el Grupo H. Uruguay dejó escapar la victoria ante Cabo Verde y Bélgica volvió a empatar, aumentando las dudas sobre su rendimiento en el Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: España despierta, Uruguay se complica y Bélgica preocupa
media:content.media:description: España goleó a Arabia Saudita y tomó impulso en el Grupo H. Uruguay dejó escapar la victoria ante Cabo Verde y Bélgica volvió a empatar, aumentando las dudas sobre su rendimiento en el Mundial 2026.

item.title: España despierta, Uruguay se complica y Bélgica preocupa

item.description: Mohamed Salah cobró un tiro de esquina magistral y el mediocampista del Al-Ahly se lanzó con una espectacular ‘palomita’ para conectar de cabeza a primer poste y firmar el tercero de los "Faraones" ante los "All Whites" en Vancouver.

media:content.media:title: ¡Golazo de Trézéguet! Con épica ‘palomita’ firmó el tercero de Egipto ante Nueva Zelanda
media:content.media:description: Mohamed Salah cobró un tiro de esquina magistral y el mediocampista del Al-Ahly se lanzó con una espectacular ‘palomita’ para conectar de cabeza a primer poste y firmar el tercero de los "Faraones" ante los "All Whites" en Vancouver.

item.title: ¡Golazo de Trézéguet! Con épica ‘palomita’ firmó el tercero de Egipto ante Nueva Zelanda

item.description: Hossam Hassan vivió con mucha intensidad cada momento del partido que terminó con la primera victoria de Egipto en una Copa Mundial. El entrenador celebró un resultado histórico que mete a los "Faraones" en los libros del futbol.

media:content.media:title: ¡Historia para Egipto! Así vivió Hossam Hassan el primer triunfo mundialista
media:content.media:description: Hossam Hassan vivió con mucha intensidad cada momento del partido que terminó con la primera victoria de Egipto en una Copa Mundial. El entrenador celebró un resultado histórico que mete a los "Faraones" en los libros del futbol.

item.title: ¡Historia para Egipto! Así vivió Hossam Hassan el primer triunfo mundialista

item.description: Aficionados de Nueva Zelanda celebran el primer gol ante Egipto, pero los fans del norte de África rugen la remontada con tres goles: uno a manos de Ziko, Salah y Trézeguet. Este es el primer triunfo de Egipto en Mundiales.

media:content.media:title: Los goles encienden la tribuna en el Estadio BC Place Vancouver
media:content.media:description: Aficionados de Nueva Zelanda celebran el primer gol ante Egipto, pero los fans del norte de África rugen la remontada con tres goles: uno a manos de Ziko, Salah y Trézeguet. Este es el primer triunfo de Egipto en Mundiales.

item.title: Los goles encienden la tribuna en el Estadio BC Place Vancouver

item.description: El delantero del Liverpool recibió en una doble pared al manchón penal y sacó un zurdazo letal para firmar su gol 69 en 118 partidos, consagrándose como máximo goleador de los “Faraones” y con ello darle la vuelta al marcador ante los "All Whites".

media:content.media:title: ¡Gol histórico de Mohamed Salah! El máximo goleador de Egipto firma la voltereta ante Nueva Zelanda
media:content.media:description: El delantero del Liverpool recibió en una doble pared al manchón penal y sacó un zurdazo letal para firmar su gol 69 en 118 partidos, consagrándose como máximo goleador de los “Faraones” y con ello darle la vuelta al marcador ante los "All Whites".

item.title: ¡Gol histórico de Mohamed Salah! El máximo goleador de Egipto firma la voltereta ante Nueva Zelanda

item.description: Guti afirma que España debe combinar la posesión con verticalidad de juego, mientras Dunga destaca el papel de Yamal y Pedri. Carlos Salcido cree que Irán hizo mejor papel que Bélgica. Dely Valdéz alerta que Cabo Verde no es sorpresa, sino realidad.

media:content.media:title: El Análisis Experto a la goleada de España, la fuerza de Irán y el empate Uruguay vs. Cabo Verde
media:content.media:description: Guti afirma que España debe combinar la posesión con verticalidad de juego, mientras Dunga destaca el papel de Yamal y Pedri. Carlos Salcido cree que Irán hizo mejor papel que Bélgica. Dely Valdéz alerta que Cabo Verde no es sorpresa, sino realidad.

item.title: El Análisis Experto a la goleada de España, la fuerza de Irán y el empate Uruguay vs. Cabo Verde

item.description: Mohamed Hany metió un centro preciso al manchón penal donde Mostafa Ziko lo recibió para conectar con un certero cabezazo y con ello emparejar la cuenta y mantener vivos a los "Faraones" ante los "All Whites" en Vancouver.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Mostafa Ziko despierta a Egipto y empata ante Nueva Zelanda en Vancouver
media:content.media:description: Mohamed Hany metió un centro preciso al manchón penal donde Mostafa Ziko lo recibió para conectar con un certero cabezazo y con ello emparejar la cuenta y mantener vivos a los "Faraones" ante los "All Whites" en Vancouver.

item.title: Gol de Mostafa Ziko despierta a Egipto y empata ante Nueva Zelanda en Vancouver

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: A radio telescope project known as the Deep Synoptic Array is moving forward. It aims to detect radio waves emitted by stars, planets, galaxies and other celestial objects.

media:content.media:text: Two prototype dishes seen outside, mountainous landscape behind them
media:content.media:description: Two prototype dishes for the Deep Synoptic Array at the Owens Valley Radio Observatory near Bishop, Calif.

media:content.media:text: People sit in a group against a wall, a project screen with people on Zoom appears in the background
media:content.media:description: Two prototype dishes for the Deep Synoptic Array at the Owens Valley Radio Observatory near Bishop, Calif.

item.title: World’s most sensitive radio telescope array set to be built in Nevada desert

item.description: Watch live coverage as Vice President JD Vance holds a press briefing at the White House.

media:content.media:title: Vance holds White House press briefing
media:content.media:description: Watch live coverage as Vice President JD Vance holds a press briefing at the White House.

item.title: Vance holds White House press briefing

item.dc:creator: Grace Thomas
item.description: Summer’s biggest sales are starting, with major weeklong deals from retailers such as Amazon, Best Buy, Target and Walmart.

media:content.media:text: Packages from Amazon Prime.
media:content.media:description: A worker sorts Amazon packages outside a Prime delivery truck in New York City on Oct. 28, 2025.

item.title: Summer sales events kick off as inflation squeezes U.S. consumers

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: WASHINGTON — Taking up a case that could further erode the rights of people to sue federal officers for constitutional violations, the Supreme Court on Monday agreed to consider whether a prison inmate could sue a nurse for failing to provide medical assistance after a riot

media:content.media:text: A man, his back to camera, receives a Covid-19 vaccination from a nurse wearing a face mask and protective gear
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court agreed to consider whether a prison inmate can sue over a lack of medical assistance after a riot.

item.title: Supreme Court to weigh rights of federal prison inmates to sue over lack of medical treatment

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: High-level talks between Iran and the United States resulted in “a lot of good progress,” Vice President JD Vance said as he left Switzerland on Monday after the two sides agreed on a road map toward reaching a final deal to end the war within 60 days.“We laid a very good foundation for a successful final deal,” Vance said at a press briefing before departing for the U.S. “The final deal is the house.

media:content.media:text: Iranian Delegation Arrives In Switzerland For Peace Talks With US
media:content.media:description: The Iranian delegation arrives for talks in Obbuergen, Switzerland on June 21, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A drone view shows vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, as seen from Musandam
media:content.media:description: Vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, as seen from Musandam, Oman, on June 15.

item.title: U.S.-Iran talks set ‘good foundation’ for deal to end war, Vance says

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: Alan Greenspan, the former chairman of the Federal Reserve Board whose economic prowess was indelibly marred for some by his actions leading up to the 2008 financial crisis, has died.

media:content.media:text: Portrait of Alan Greenspan
media:content.media:description: Alan Greenspan in 1974.

media:content.media:text: Alan Greenspan on July 13 1974, in New York.
media:content.media:description: Alan Greenspan in 1974.

media:content.media:text: Federal Reserve Board Chairman Alan Greenspan and his new bride NBC Television correspondent Andrea Mitchell outside the The Inn in Little Washington, Va., after their wedding on April 6,1997.
media:content.media:description: Alan Greenspan and Andrea Mitchell after their wedding April 6, 1997.

media:content.media:text: Gerald Ford and Alan Greenspan at Economic Summit
media:content.media:description: Greenspan alongside President Gerald Ford as chairman of the Council of Economic Advisors in 1974.

media:content.media:text: Greenspan and Mitchell with Queen Elizabeth II and the Duke of Edinburgh at Balmoral castle in Scotland in 2002.
media:content.media:description: Greenspan and Mitchell with Queen Elizabeth II and the Duke of Edinburgh at Balmoral castle in Scotland in 2002.

media:content.media:text: Bush Honors Presidential Medal Of Freedom Recipients
media:content.media:description: Greenspan receives the Medal of Freedom from President George W. Bush in 2005.

media:content.media:text: Federal Reserve Chairman Alan Greenspan on June 17, 1999 in Washington.
media:content.media:description: Greenspan in 1999.

item.title: Alan Greenspan, economist and longtime head of the Federal Reserve, dies at 100

item.dc:creator: Adela Suliman
item.description: Smoke continued to cloud swathes of Los Angeles for a sixth day Monday, after a fire broke out at a warehouse in the Boyle Heights area.

media:content.media:text: Newsom Declares State of Emergency For LA Warehouse Fire
media:content.media:description: Smoke rises over East Los Angeles on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Newsom Declares State of Emergency For LA Warehouse Fire
media:content.media:description: Smoke rises over East Los Angeles on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Los Angeles cold storage warehouse fire continues for third day
media:content.media:description: Smoke rises over East Los Angeles on Saturday.

item.title: Smoke blankets parts of L.A. after Boyle Heights warehouse fire

item.dc:creator: Henry Austin
Nick Duffy
Freddie Clayton
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced Monday that he will quit, clearing Andy Burnham’s path to succeed him as leader of the Labour Party and U.K.

media:content.media:text: Keir Starmer, UK prime minister, makes a statement outside 10 Downing Street in London, UK, on Monday, June 22, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Starmer made a statement outside No. 10 Downing Street on Monday morning, ending weeks of mounting speculation.

media:content.media:text: Keir Starmer, UK prime minister, makes a statement outside 10 Downing Street in London, UK, on Monday, June 22, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Keir Starmer’s voice choked with emotion near the end of the brief statement.

media:content.media:text: Andy Burnham Speaks In Makerfield After By-Election Victory
media:content.media:description: Burnham's resounding special election win in Makerfield last week sharpened the focus on Starmer's future.

media:content.media:text: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Travels To Washington
media:content.media:description: Mandelson with Starmer at the ambassador's residence in Washington in 2025.

media:content.media:text: UK Prime Minister Starmer on the Brink With Resignation Plan Expected Imminently
media:content.media:description: The next prime minister will become the country’s seventh leader in a decade.

media:content.media:text: A G7 summit is set to take place June 15 to 17 in the French town of Evian-les-Bains near Switzerland and it will be attended by country leaders as well as the EU's foreign policy chief and ministers from Brazil, Canada, the United Arab Emirates and Turkey. (Photo by Isabel Infantes / POOL / AFP via Getty Images)
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump and Starmer at the G7 summit in Evian, France, last week.

item.title: Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister, clearing the path for the country’s 7th leader in a decade

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: “Oliver is now back in California where he can finally rest,” said a post on his social media accounts. Six people died when two helicopters collided June 14, authorities have said.

media:content.media:text: Oliver Tree performing onstage.
media:content.media:description: Oliver Tree performing at the BottleRock Napa Valley Festival in Napa, Calif., in 2024.

media:content.media:text: Charred vehicles seen from an overhead, aerial perspective.
media:content.media:description: Oliver Tree performing at the BottleRock Napa Valley Festival in Napa, Calif., in 2024.

media:content.media:text: Oliver Tree performing onstage.
media:content.media:description: Oliver Tree performing at the BottleRock Napa Valley Festival in Napa, Calif., in 2024.

item.title: Singer Oliver Tree’s body back in California after helicopter crash in Brazil

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 has thousands of deals, but not all are worth shopping. Here’s what to buy and what to skip during the sale.

media:content.media:text: Prime Day historically offers some of the best deals on tech, small home and kitchen appliances, everyday essentials and summer-related products.
media:content.media:description: Prime Day historically offers some of the best deals on tech, small home and kitchen appliances, everyday essentials and summer-related products.

media:content.media:text: Prime Day historically offers some of the best deals on tech, small home and kitchen appliances, everyday essentials and summer-related products.
media:content.media:description: Prime Day historically offers some of the best deals on tech, small home and kitchen appliances, everyday essentials and summer-related products.

item.title: What’s actually worth buying during Amazon Prime Day 2026? Experts share what you should get and what you should skip

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Save on charcoal, electric, and portable grills at Walmart before July 4th. These deals won’t last long — shop now and get ready for a summer of cookouts.

media:content.media:text: Walmart has portable grills, smokers and more on sale right now.
media:content.media:description: Walmart has portable grills, smokers and more on sale right now.

media:content.media:text: Walmart has portable grills, smokers and more on sale right now.
media:content.media:description: Walmart has portable grills, smokers and more on sale right now.

item.title: Walmart has grills for as little as $70 just in time for cookout season
